detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MostInterestingPlace._transfer(address,address,uint256) (MostInterestingPlace.sol#645-769):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (MostInterestingPlace.sol#709)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (MostInterestingPlace.sol#783-795)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (MostInterestingPlace.sol#715)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(tfrAmt) (MostInterestingPlace.sol#805)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.sub(tfrAmt)) (MostInterestingPlace.sol#807)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (MostInterestingPlace.sol#767)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (MostInterestingPlace.sol#933)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (MostInterestingPlace.sol#913)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (MostInterestingPlace.sol#915)
	MostInterestingPlace._rOwned (MostInterestingPlace.sol#321) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MostInterestingPlace._takeTeam(uint256) (MostInterestingPlace.sol#927-935)
	- MostInterestingPlace._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (MostInterestingPlace.sol#887-923)
	- MostInterestingPlace.balanceOf(address) (MostInterestingPlace.sol#471-475)
	- MostInterestingPlace.constructor() (MostInterestingPlace.sol#405-435)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (MostInterestingPlace.sol#767)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (MostInterestingPlace.sol#941)
	MostInterestingPlace._rTotal (MostInterestingPlace.sol#333) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MostInterestingPlace._getCurrentSupply() (MostInterestingPlace.sol#1083-1093)
	- MostInterestingPlace._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (MostInterestingPlace.sol#939-945)
	- MostInterestingPlace.constructor() (MostInterestingPlace.sol#405-435)
	- MostInterestingPlace.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (MostInterestingPlace.sol#567-589)
